message:
config(codex): replace invalid --yolo with --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox (cherry-pick from PR #1357)

Codex CLI renamed its permissive flag. Cherry-picked this fix only;
the broader startup bootstrap refactor in PR #1357 is being declined
in favor of smaller, targeted changes.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/1357
Author: corymhall
Co-authored-by: Cory Hall <cory.hall3@gmail.com>
